document_title: Capsizing and Sinking of Towing Vessel Baylor J. Tregre (MIR-25-21)
notes: 17-page NTSB Marine Investigation Report (MIR-25-21) covering the May 13, 2024 capsizing of a 67-ft towing vessel. Includes event sequence, weather forecasts and reports, probable cause, and vessel particulars table. Investigation case ID DCA24FM038.
